pkgmetadata.longdescription: Dask Kubernetes.. image httpsgithub.comdaskdask-kubernetesworkflowsCIbadge.svg target httpsgithub.comdaskdask-kubernetesactionsqueryworkflow3ACI.. image httpsimg.shields.ioreadthedocsdask-kubernetescolor232980B9logoread-the-docslogoColorwhite target httpskubernetes.dask.org alt Read the Docs.. image httpsimg.shields.ioreadthedocsdask-kubernetescolor232980B9labeldeveloper20docslogoread-the-docslogoColorwhite target httpskubernetes.dask.orgreleasing.html alt Read the Docs Developer.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivdask-kubernetes target httpspypi.orgprojectdask-kubernetes alt PyPI.. image httpsimg.shields.iocondavnconda-forgedask-kubernetes target httpsanaconda.orgconda-forgedask-kubernetes alt Conda Forge.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgepython20support-3.87C3.97C3.10-blue target httpskubernetes.dask.orgenlatestinstalling.htmlsupported-versions alt Python Support.. image httpsimg.shields.iobadgeKubernetes20support-1.227C1.237C1.247C1.25-blue target httpskubernetes.dask.orgenlatestinstalling.htmlsupported-versions alt Kubernetes SupportNative Kubernetes integration for Dask.
